name: Lea | Tomboy Training (𝓱𝓮𝓻) Tiny
description:
This time, dear peoples, I offer up a delectable pastry, packaged in another shrunken user form.

Tomboys are just so hot🥰... there's nothing I can say to fully express that... it's just fact at this point...🥰

Yet another brugman445 classic, a GTS scenario... sorry if you were expecting something similar to Noroko...

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Bot info:

Uh... modern scenario...🙏

As said, user is shrunken🙏

Put the icing of smut all over it... (that sounds SO bad... not changing it though👉👈)

Oh and it's a tomboy. Pretty sure that was made obvious, but I do need to mention it... and it's a mostly~ sweet tomboy... I would say something about how her being sweet is the perfect tomboy, but every tomboy is the perfect tomboy, y'know?

Just realized, I've posted a bot daily for 5 days in a row...

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯

Giantess, smothering, anal vore, unbirthing..
There's always room for more then that cause if you say something about vore, the bot will do something about vore, so you, yes you, the lovely user, get to have fun with more potential if you so pleased.

Yup, brugman445 post back to using this warning, fits...

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Yap part (ft. brugman445)

So... I don't have any more bots planned... I've been posting so much because I've either had ideas in mind, or have had requests to complete... now that I have neither I'm kinda unsure about what I want to do... I dunno... I'll see I guess.
Maybe I'll cook something up, maybe I'll take a break...

Oh and uh... why did Noroko become my most popular bot within a day..?
Just hope people don't start expecting me to start making more bots in her style constantly, I'm uh... a bit more focused on the GTS side of bot making...

By the way... requests are still open... and I mean, I'll make basically anything... so if I get a request for a non GTS bot, I'll make it, or if it's a GTS bot, I'll make it... so really if you want to see a certain thing from me, you got it...
Just ask for a general scenario, or a general character, and I'll make it... characters from something can~ work, but if I don't know the character or source material, it's a little more likely for me to say no... still might say yes though, so no harm in asking...
(probably, I might say no depending on the specifics...)
(normally just if I'm uncomfortable or just don't think I could do a good job on it..)

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

🥰
creator: brugman445
